name: Blackened Chicken
recipeIngredient: 16 pieces of 3 oz skinless chicken breasts
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Mix salt, paprika, garlic powder, cayenne pepper, black pepper, and dried thyme in a bowl.
3. Pound each chicken breast to an even thickness using a meat mallet or rolling pin.
4. Coat one side of each chicken breast with the seasoning mixture.
5. Place the seasoned chicken breasts in the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side until browned, but not cooked through.
6. Flip the chicken breasts and sprinkle the remaining seasoning mixture over the uncooked side.
7. Continue cooking for another 2-3 minutes on each side until fully cooked and blackened.
8. Remove from heat and let rest for a few minutes before serving.
